name: @tanstack/lit-query
description: Lit adapter for TanStack Query Core

scripts.build: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build:esm && pnpm run build:cjs
scripts.build:cjs: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-cjs', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs
scripts.example:e2e: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e
scripts.example:e2e:headed: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:headed
scripts.example:e2e:query-error: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:query-error
scripts.example:e2e:mutation-error: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:mutation-error
scripts.example:e2e:refetch-button: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:refetch-button
scripts.example:e2e:lifecycle-reconnect: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:lifecycle-reconnect
scripts.example:e2e:lifecycle-contract: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:lifecycle-contract
scripts.example:e2e:all: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:all
scripts.example:e2e:all:headed: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:all:headed
scripts.example:pagination:e2e: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:prefetch: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:prefetch
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:error: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:error
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:mutations: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:mutations
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:boundary: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:boundary
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:all: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:all
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:all:headed: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:all:headed
scripts.example:ssr:dev: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run dev
scripts.example:ssr:dev:public-origin: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run dev:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:default: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:error: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:error
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:refreshing: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:refreshing
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:public-origin: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e: pnpm run example:ssr:e2e:default && pnpm run example:ssr:e2e:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:all:default: pnpm run build && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:all
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:all:nobuild: pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:all && pnpm --dir examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:all: pnpm run example:ssr:e2e:all:default && pnpm run example:ssr:e2e:public-origin
